How should I parse streamed Markdown?

Start with an incremental parser. Example Docs+2

Checklist

  • Preserve incomplete tokens
  • Render stable blocks
parser.write(chunk);
Injected extension control
Prepared by GPT-5.4 Thinking
How do I keep citations?

Convert citation pills to footnotes Example Docs and keep distinct sources Spec & Guide .

An invalid citation keeps its visible label: Unsafe label.
